name_en: Authentic-grade, Original Factory Leather Version 【Leather Mixed with Old Blue Tiger with Strap New Size】
name_cn:
Authentic-grade, Original Factory Leather Version 【Leather Mixed with Old Blue Tiger with Strap New Size】
Dior Mini Book Tote
A retro and stylish statement piece ♡ The exquisite embroidery perfectly presents the look. Just throw it on to add a highlight to your outfit~ This mini size is so cute! The small bag shape is also very convenient for carrying small items. Who uses it becomes stylish. A must-have for pretty girls who love high aesthetics.
Style No.: 1265/1286
Size: 26.5×21×14cm
Fits an iPad Air 4 or an iPad Pro 11
